summary: Compared P0-03 Recovery-Key Contradiction, P0-05 Native Instruction Authority Gate, and P0-05C Runtime Instruction Authority Gate from the provided implementable plan against the current DinoBrain repo and data root. Found no implemented dedicated gates/scanners/status artifacts for these three items; only partial adjacent behavior exists for subordinate memory/current-user priority and pre-response fail-closed context.
decisions: Treat the three plan items as not implemented as final readiness gates in current DinoBrain.
Report source-file and data-root evidence only; no code or data repairs performed.
Use trace_only because this was a read-only audit.
next_steps: Implement recovery-key polarity/currentness resolver plus wiki_lint_status recovery_key gate if P0-03 is next.
Implement native instruction surface scanner/status/UI/final-readiness wiring if P0-05 is next.
Implement runtime instruction authority scanner/status/UI/final-readiness wiring if P0-05C is next.
